DELIVERED.title: Delivered
DELIVERED.description: This card triggers an additional effect when it is[gold]delivered[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-ANTI_GRAVITY: Apply {ImbalancePower:diff()} Imbalance, deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} [gold]spell[/gold] damage, and make the target gain {TemporaryFlyPower:diff()} Temporary Flight.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-TOUCH_AND_TU: If the target has [gold]Imbalance[/gold], make it immediately become [gold]Weightless[/gold], remove its current [gold]Imbalance[/gold], make it lose HP equal to half that [gold]Imbalance[/gold], and [gold]Stun[/gold] it. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} for every 20 [gold]Imbalance[/gold] removed this way. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-GRAVITY_NODE: Apply {ImbalancePower} [gold]Imbalance[/gold], then deal {Damage} damage. If this card makes the target become [gold]Weightless[/gold], permanently increase this card's [gold]Imbalance[/gold] by {ImbalanceIncrease:diff()}; if this card deals a [gold]fatal[/gold] blow, permanently increase its damage by {DamageIncrease:diff()}.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-PACKAGE_PREV: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deliver the most recently sent card, then place it on top of your draw pile.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-EARLY_DELIVE: Immediately deliver all sent cards. Apply {ImbalancePower:diff()} [gold]Imbalance[/gold] to all enemies. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-MIRACLE_COUR: Send all other cards in your hand. Draw the same number of cards. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-LOCATOR.desc: Lose {FocusPower:diff()} [gold]Focus[/gold]. Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Add 1 Converter to your draw pile. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-LITTLE_TRICK: Choose 1 other card in your hand. Create a copy of it and [gold]send[/gold] the copy.
LITTLE_TRICK.selectPrompt: Choose a card to copy and send
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} [gold]spell[/gold] damage. [gold]Send[/gold] a copy of this card.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-HOVER.title: Hover
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-CHARGED_IMPA:
Apply {ImbalancePower:diff()} [gold]Imbalance[/gold]. Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} [gold]spell[/gold] damage.
[gold]Delivered[/gold]: Randomize this card's energy cost for this combat.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-STARBEAM.des: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} [gold]spell[/gold] damage. If the target is [gold]Airborne[/gold], deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} [gold]spell[/gold] damage again.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-AERIAL_SUPPR: Give the target {FlyPower:diff()} [gold]Fly[/gold] and make it lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} Strength this turn.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-LIME_STORM.d: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} [gold]spell[/gold] damage to the target. Deal {SplashDamage:diff()} damage to all.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-UP_THERE.des: Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]spell[/gold] Block. If you are [gold]Airborne[/gold], apply {ImbalancePower:diff()} [gold]Imbalance[/gold] to all enemies that are not [gold]Airborne[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-DOWN_HERE.de: If you are not [gold]Airborne[/gold], apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and {ImbalancePower:diff()} [gold]Imbalance[/gold] to all [gold]Airborne[/gold] enemies. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice. If the enemy leaves [gold]Airborne[/gold], gain {EnergyGain:energyIcons()}.
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} [gold]spell[/gold] damage. If the target is in [gold]Weightless[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-PRISM_RAY.de: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} [gold]spell[/gold] damage. Transform all [gold]delivered[/gold] cards{IfUpgraded:show: and upgrade them}.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-BANDAGE.desc: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Add an enchantment to {IfUpgraded:show:all cards|1 card} in your hand: [gold]Delivered[/gold], {EnchantAll:cond:>0?they gain upgrades|it gains an upgrade} this combat.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-UPDRAFT.desc: At the start of your turn, gain 1 [gold]Temporary Fly[/gold]. If you leave [gold]Airborne[/gold] because of an attack, add a Dazed to your draw pile.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-GRAVITY_BARR: Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]spell[/gold] Block. This turn, whenever damage from an enemy is fully blocked, apply {GravityBarrierPower:diff()} [gold]Imbalance[/gold] to the damage source.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-PRECISION_AD: Apply {ImbalancePower:diff()} [gold]Imbalance[/gold] to all enemies. At the start of next turn, they lose {PrecisionAdjustmentPower} [gold]Imbalance[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-EMERGENCY_SP: Shuffle 1 [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your discard pile. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-COURIER_TRAI: At the start of each turn, gain {CourierTrainingPower:diff()} [gold]Fly[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-QUICK_DISPAT: Gain the {DeliveredCards:diff()} most recently [gold]delivered[/gold] card(s). [gold]Send[/gold] {Cards:diff()} card(s).
QUICK_DISPATCH.selectPrompt: Choose a card to deliver immediately
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-PART_TIME_JO: At the end of the turn, if you did not play an Attack this turn, heal {Heal:diff()} HP. [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-MESSENGER_CO: Draw 1 extra card each turn, then [gold]send[/gold] 1 card.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-IM_COMING_DO: Lose all [gold]Fly[/gold]. For each stack lost, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-TWO_STAGE_SP: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. If you have played a card with the same name this combat, gain {TemporaryFlyPower:diff()} [gold]Temporary Fly[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-ENERGY_CYCLE: Each turn, when you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], [gold]Skill[/gold], or [gold]Power[/gold] card that costs at least 2 Energy, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Each type can trigger up to {EnergyCyclePower} times.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-FAST_CHARGE_: This turn, double the [gold]Imbalance[/gold] you apply.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-DECEL_BINDER: Whenever you play an Attack, apply 1 [gold]Stagger[/gold] to its target.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-INERTIA.desc: Whenever an enemy becomes [gold]Weightless[/gold], or if any enemy is [gold]Weightless[/gold] at the start of the turn, draw {InertiaPower:diff()} cards.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-NATURAL_BURS: Whenever you deal [gold]spell[/gold] damage to an enemy, apply {NaturalBurstPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to all enemies.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-REALITY_MANI: Whenever a card enters or leaves your [gold]Exhaust[/gold] pile, gain {RealityManipulationPower:diff()} Block.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-INVERSION_SY: Spend X Energy. Play the first X non-Inversion Symmetry cards from the top of your discard pile, from top to bottom.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-SCEPTER_ANTI: Apply {ImbalancePower:diff()} [gold]Imbalance[/gold] and {TemporaryFlyPower:diff()} [gold]Temporary Fly[/gold] to all enemies. Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} [gold]spell[/gold] damage.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-ULTIMATE_BIG: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} [gold]spell[/gold] damage to all enemies. Lose your rightmost Relic.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-SPECIAL_GRAV: Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], if its target is not [gold]Airborne[/gold], give it {FlyPower:diff()} [gold]Fly[/gold]. Whenever you play a card, [gold]Airborne[/gold] enemies take 2 damage.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-PARTICLE_MOD: Your Attacks deal half damage. The first time each Attack is played each turn, return it to your hand, and the next time it is played this turn it costs no Energy.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-QUALITY_VISI: At the start of the next {QualityVisitorPower:diff()} turns, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold], 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold], and 1 [gold]Focus[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-SECURITY_CHE: Whenever you [gold]Deliver[/gold] a Status or Curse, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it and apply {SecurityCheckPower} [gold]Imbalance[/gold] to all enemies.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-CHAIN_TECHNI: Apply {ImbalancePower:diff()} [gold]Imbalance[/gold]. Gain {ChantTemporaryFocusNextTurnPower:diff()} [gold]Temporary Focus[/gold]. If this card causes the target to become [gold]Weightless[/gold], gain {FocusPower:diff()} [gold]Focus[/gold] instead.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-FUTURE_OBSER: When played, choose 5 cards in your deck to appear on top of your draw pile next combat.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-IMPORTANT_CO: {When this card is played or [gold]Delivered[/gold] {Count} times, once per combat, gain 1 random Relic, then reset the count and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-SIRACUSAN_DE: Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s). Add 1 [gold]Unclaimed Parcel[/gold] to your discard pile.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-ANNIHILATION: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} [gold]spell[/gold] damage to all enemies. If any target is [gold]Fatally[/gold] killed, this combat grants no card rewards.
